_comment: Static event calendar — manual updates by operator. Module reloads every 60 min.

_schema.ts: ISO 8601 with timezone OR 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS ET' (will be parsed as America/New_York)
_schema.ticker: AAPL/MSFT/GOOG/META/AMZN/TSLA/NVDA/AVGO for Mag-8; ALL/SPX/QQQ for macro events
_schema.type: earnings_pre_market | earnings_after_close | earnings_during | fomc_decision | cpi_release | nfp_release | jobs_data | other
_schema.notes: free-form description (e.g. quarter, expected EPS, etc)
